---
title: "Low cost drones in applied science"
id: material-hs-5
order: 45
summary: "Applications of drone in disaster management: A scoping review."
source_url: "https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1355030621001477"
modules:
  - module-introduction
Goals:
  - module-goals
activities: []
assessments:
  - assessment
labels:
  - supplement
  - recommended
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Hardware_Software/material-hs-5.md"
---

Read the article:

<https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1355030621001477>

## Connected Module

- [UAV based remote Sensing - A Brief Overview](../modules/module-introduction.qmd)
